products.title: Daikin 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC (MTKL50XV16)
products.short_description: Daikin 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC (MTKL50XV16) is a reliable and energy-efficient air conditioner designed for medium-sized rooms. It offers powerful cooling, PM2.5 air filtration, and durable copper condenser technology, making it ideal for Indian summers.
products.long_description:
The Daikin MTKL50XV16 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC is engineered to deliver consistent and efficient cooling performance for medium-sized rooms (approximately 111–150 sq. ft.). Powered by advanced inverter technology, it intelligently adjusts compressor speed based on cooling requirements, ensuring lower electricity consumption and stable temperature control.

This AC features a high-quality copper condenser coil that enhances heat transfer and durability while reducing maintenance costs. The integrated PM2.5 filter improves indoor air quality by trapping fine dust particles, making it suitable for urban homes.

With features like Power Chill operation, 3D airflow, and quiet operation, the AC provides fast cooling even during extreme summer conditions. It is built to handle voltage fluctuations without the need for a stabilizer, offering additional convenience. Overall, the Daikin MTKL50XV16 is a dependable choice for users seeking a balance between performance, durability, and affordability.
highlights: 1.5 Ton capacity suitable for medium rooms
Inverter swing compressor for power saving
pros: Good air filtration with PM2.5 filter

positive: Cools room quickly even in high temperatures

seo.meta_description: Buy Daikin MTKL50XV16 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC with latest price, features, pros & cons. Best AC for medium rooms in India.
